category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a functional testing framework for command-line applications; official homepage says the same and documents the test format: https://bitheap.org/cram/
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is 'Cram: It's test time' and source_facts.name is cram: https://bitheap.org/cram/
docs_sources: Official homepage is a dedicated documentation page with install, usage, and development sections: https://bitheap.org/cram/; official GitHub README mirrors usage documentation: https://github.com/aiiie/cram#readme
repo_sources: Official homepage development section says to clone https://github.com/aiiie/cram.git: https://bitheap.org/cram/
tags_sources: Official homepage describes Cram tests as command-line shell-session tests and documents command usage: https://bitheap.org/cram/
